总结一下优缺点，优点对于哆啦A梦系列的角色人设比较还原方面
缺点是对于水门的人设修改方面感觉有点奇怪，太过年轻化处理了。","text_exts":[{"e":43,"s":39,"text":"哆啦A梦","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%93%86%E5%95%A6A%E6%A2%A6&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177418183580C6DAD6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227336253842901861145%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227303517835752377406%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%93%86%E5%95%A6A%E6%A2%A6%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708106929,"group_id":"7303517835752377406","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"此人很帅，很鸽，很懒","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9qWVcccMwWr9uHFGca+KOk3AxN9UljrPtdKfeaEnhMM","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/84f05eb1c78d48a38570eaf63858173e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702148&x-signature=ml%2Fi0qN95JnW%2FmVmCipr%2FFSBT28%3D","user_id":"1311089832757315","user_name":"霉运退散"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1311089832757315","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7303517835752377406","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫】 【日常】【无后宫】【单女主玖辛奈】【女主出场晚】【前面的情感线塑造可能真的有问题，我发帖解释了一下，但是作者真不是往‘爱恋向’感情线塑造的】
第四次忍界大战结束，在秽土转生结束后，水门发现自己并没有回到净土，再次睁眼时，他发现自己已经来到了一个没有忍者的世界，身体里还多出一个叫“系统”的家伙，系统告诉水门它可以帮助水门重新回到忍界，但前提是水门要帮助它，从特定人物那里，收集一种名为“情绪值”的能量，为了再次与家人相聚，水门踏上了收集“情绪值”的道路……
来自22世纪的机器猫，古灵精怪的5岁马铃薯小子，奇怪的小学生侦探，能看到妖怪的少年……
在陌生的异世界，在收集“情绪值”的路上，水门也收获到不少新的羁绊。
